entries.description: Presented identity or credential cannot be authenticated.
Identity, entitlement, capability, policy, or resource authorization denied the operation.
Input, output, schema, domain, or protocol validation failed.
Required provider, adapter, protocol, model, or tool capability is unavailable.
Provider or platform rate limit rejected the invocation; Retry-After may be supplied.
Required worker, token, sandbox, queue, or provider capacity is temporarily unavailable.
Temporary provider, network, storage, or service availability failure.
Deadline elapsed; safeToRetry and effectMayHaveOccurred determine response.
Invocation or operation was cancelled or cancellation was requested.
Provider safety, policy, legal, or account policy refused the operation.
Provider result violated declared stream, schema, or media contract.
The external effect may have occurred and requires reconciliation before retry.
External system permanently rejected the valid request.
Expected version, idempotency payload, or concurrent state conflicts with current authority.
Classification, residency, purpose, retention, or egress policy rejected the operation.
A hard money, token, activity, invocation, or time budget is exhausted.
Pinned model, tool, adapter, package, or protocol dependency is no longer available.
Unexpected adapter, runtime, or implementation defect.
